product_overview: KNH_VAMS is a mobile/web application for managing visitor check-ins, appointments, and blacklist control across an organization. It lets reception/security staff, employees and admins register users, create and manage appointments, and monitor active visitors through a unified dashboard.
core_goals: Allow staff to quickly authenticate and access the system (login/register).
Provide a dashboard that shows current visitor and appointment overview metrics.
Enable employees to create and manage appointments for their guests.
Allow reception/security to view and manage visitor records and check-ins.
Maintain and manage a blacklist to prevent or flag restricted visitors.
Enable authorized users to generate and manage application security keys.
Allow users to view and update their profile and application settings.

features.name: User Login and Registration
features.description: Users sign in with email/password or create a new account; client-side form validation guides correct input before account creation or login.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> See dashboard at /(app)/dashboard
Navigate to / -> Switch to register mode -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit register form -> See dashboard at /(app)/dashboard
Navigate to / -> Fill email input with invalid format -> Fill password input -> Submit register form -> See validation error indicating invalid email format
Navigate to / -> Leave required fields empty -> Submit login form -> See validation errors for required fields

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: After authentication, users see an overview of key metrics such as expected visitors, active visitors, and recent check-ins to quickly assess site activity.
user_flows: Navigate to /(app)/dashboard -> View active visitors and recent check-ins

features.name: Appointments
features.description: Employees can create, view and manage future appointments for visitors; appointment status and details are visible in a centralized list.
user_flows: Navigate to /(app)/appointments -> Start appointment creation -> Fill appointment details (date, time, guest, department) -> Submit appointment -> See new appointment in appointments list
Navigate to /(app)/appointments -> View appointments list -> Select appointment -> View appointment details
Navigate to /(app)/appointments -> Edit appointment details -> Submit changes -> See updated appointment in appointments list

features.name: Visitors
features.description: Reception and security staff can view visitor records, inspect visit logs, and perform check-in/check-out operations to track who is currently on-site.
user_flows: Navigate to /(app)/visitors -> View list of visitors -> Select visitor -> See visitor details and visit logs
Navigate to /(app)/visitors -> Start visitor check-in -> Fill check-in data -> Submit check-in -> See visitor status updated to inside
Navigate to /(app)/visitors -> Start visitor check-out -> Confirm check-out details -> Submit check-out -> See visitor status updated to exited

features.name: Blacklist
features.description: Authorized users can view and maintain a blacklist of restricted individuals and the system warns when a visitor matches blacklist criteria during entry or appointment creation.
user_flows: Navigate to /(app)/blacklist -> View blacklist entries -> Start add blacklist entry -> Fill blacklist details -> Submit blacklist entry -> See entry added to blacklist
Navigate to /(app)/visitors -> Start adding visitor -> Fill visitor details that match blacklist criteria -> See blacklist warning

features.name: Key Generation (Security)
features.description: Authorized users can generate and manage cryptographic keys used for protecting sensitive information and application-level security operations.
user_flows: Navigate to /(app)/keygen -> Request new key generation -> Confirm generation intent -> See generated key summary
Navigate to /(app)/keygen -> View existing keys -> Revoke or archive a key -> See updated key list

features.name: Settings and Profile Management
features.description: Users can view and update their profile and application settings such as departmental preferences and basic account details.
user_flows: Navigate to /(app)/settings -> View profile settings -> Update a profile field -> Save settings -> See updated profile information
Navigate to /(app)/settings -> Start password update -> Fill new password and confirmation with mismatch -> Submit change -> See validation error for password mismatch

routes.description: List of scheduled or active visitors

features.name: User Login and Registration
features.description: Login and sign up functional blocks using React Hook Form and Supabase
user_interactions: Handle success or error validation states
